name: Riyas
about: I am a full-stack developer who enjoys building web applications, solving problems, and turning ideas into real products.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: An e-commerce platform built using Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Clerk, AWS RDS, and AWS S3.

projects.name: Goods Management System
projects.description: A management system that stores goods, tracks manufactured dates, categorizes aging products, and visualizes them using a funnel interface.

projects.name: Personal AI Portfolio
projects.description: An interactive portfolio where visitors can talk to a digital version of Riyas through AI-powered conversations.

experience: Creating responsive user interfaces with Next.js

business.description: I run a digital marketing company and create content for platforms such as Instagram and YouTube.

goals: Build products used by millions of people

faq.question: What do you do?
faq.answer: I am a Full Stack Developer and entrepreneur.

faq.question: What technologies do you use?
faq.answer: I mainly work with Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS, Tailwind CSS, Stripe, and Clerk.

faq.question: What is your goal?
faq.answer: My goal is to build products that can reach millions of users and become a great software engineer.
